headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日娱乐热搜
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周新片仅1部。热搜榜《痴迷》居首，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后。
summaryEn: No new movies today, only 1 this week. Obsession leads trending, followed by Silo and Enola Holmes 3.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周持续热门
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 remains popular this week

industryHighlights.text: 《权力的游戏前传：龙族》热议不断
industryHighlights.en: Game of Thrones prequel: House of the Dragon trending

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将上映引期待
industryHighlights.en: Spider-Man: Brand New Day upcoming excites fans
Toy Story 5 on this week's trending list
